mapper.select: SELECT id FROM app_message_car WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId} AND mess_id = #{carMid}
SELECT url FROM app_message_url WHERE message_id = #{id} AND type = 1 and source = #{source}

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c on c.mess_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND c.vehicle_results = 3 AND a.checkid = '调度'

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c on c.mess_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND c.vehicle_results = 2 AND a.checkid = '调度'

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c on c.mess_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND c.vehicle_results = 4 AND a.checkid = '调度'

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c on c.mess_id = b.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND c.vehicle_results is not null AND a.checkid = '调度'
SELECT url FROM app_message_url WHERE message_id = #{cid} AND type = #{type}
